sections.heading: Stop letting missed calls cost you sales.
sections.subheading: Biscuit replaces clunky answering services and call centers. Build an AI agent that sounds human, answers immediately, qualifies leads, and books appointments 24/7.
sections.caption: Live in under 5 minutes. No coding required.

sections.label: Trusted by fast-growing businesses that live on the phone

sections.heading: Everything your phone line needs, built right in.

cards.title: Conversations that actually sound human.
cards.description: Your agent sounds natural, handles interruptions perfectly, and adapts to the caller's answers. Say goodbye to awkward, robotic 'press 1 for sales' menus.

cards.title: Set up a new number in seconds.
cards.description: Pick a local or toll-free number immediately, or simply forward your existing business line to your Biscuit agent. You'll be taking calls out of the box.

cards.title: Run outbound campaigns while you sleep.
cards.description: Upload a CSV, set a schedule, and let your agent automatically dial through your lead list. Every call outcome is logged, transcribed, and tracked in real-time.

sections.heading: Live and taking calls in under 5 minutes.
sections.label: Setup

steps.title: Tell the AI about your business.
steps.description: Explain who you are, what you do, and provide FAQs or pricing so it answers accurately.

steps.title: Get a phone number.
steps.description: Choose a new local line or forward your current one. Your AI agent is instantly ready to start dialing and receiving.

steps.title: Let it run.
steps.description: Your agent answers questions, texts follow-up links, and syncs booked appointments straight to your chosen calendar.

items.question: Can Biscuit text customers after a call?
items.answer: Yes. Biscuit can seamlessly send SMS confirmations, scheduling links, or follow-up texts straight from the same phone number immediately after a call ends.

items.question: How smart is the AI really?
items.answer: You can choose from the top models available, including GPT-4o and Claude 3.5 Sonnet, guaranteeing high-quality reasoning capable of holding natural qualification conversations.

items.question: What happens if a caller asks a question the AI doesn't know?
items.answer: You can configure your agent's fallback behavior to politely take a message, escalate to a live human instantly via multi-agent routing, or promise an SMS follow-up.

sections.heading: Stop missing calls. Start closing more leads.
sections.subheading: Set up your AI phone agent in minutes. No contracts. No hardware. No engineering team required.
